subcodes.first_line: God willing, thou mayest be set ablaze with the fire of divine love and illumined by the light of His countenance, so that the entirety of the world may be enlightened unto the recognition of this Day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله بنار محبت الهی مشتعل باشی و بنور وجهش منور جمیع عالم از برای عرفان این روز
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power of prayer, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual transformation, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
